status.description:
- `DRAFT` — not yet deployed; safe to edit
- `ENABLED` — window scheduling active
- `DISABLED` — scheduling paused; manual triggers still work
- `ARCHIVED` — retired; read-only
status.title: ProfileStatus

startCronExpression.description: 6-field Spring cron expression that OPENS the window

endCronExpression.description: 6-field Spring cron expression that CLOSES the window

autoCreateDefaultWindow.description: Create a window instance even if no events are collected

maxDurationMinutes.description: Safety cap — force-close if window stays open beyond this duration

condition.description:
- `ON_OPEN` — fires when the window opens
- `ON_CLOSING` — fires when the window closes
- `RECURRING_WHILE_OPEN` — fires on `recurringInterval` while window is open
- `ON_EMPTY_CLOSE` — fires at close if zero events were collected
- `ON_THRESHOLD_REACHED` — fires when event count crosses a configured threshold
- `ON_ERROR` — fires when any action in the chain fails
- `ON_MANUAL_TRIGGER` — fires only via explicit API call
- `ON_DUPLICATE_DETECTED` — fires when a duplicate event is rejected
condition.title: ActionCondition

executionOrder.description: Execution order within the same condition (ascending)

continueOnFailure.description: If false, the action chain stops and ON_ERROR fires when this action fails

config.description:
Type-specific configuration. Shape depends on `type`:
- `FILE_TO_EVENTS` → `{ specId, integrationId, onSuccess, onFailure }`
- `EVENTS_TO_FILE` → `{ specId, integrationId, emptyFilePolicy, batchSize }`
- `NOTIFY` → `{ channel, template, recipients, severity }`
- `VALIDATE_COMPLETENESS` → `{ expectedCountSource, tolerance, onMismatch }`
- `TRANSFORM_AND_ROUTE` → `{ specId, routes, fanOutStrategy }`
- `ARCHIVE` → `{ integrationId, pathTemplate, compression, retentionDays }`
- `INVOKE_EXTERNAL` → `{ integrationId, method, pathTemplate, bodyTemplate, retry }`

integrations.description: Integration IDs referenced by this Profile's actions

schema.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details for HTTP APIs
schema.title: ProblemDetail

schema.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details for HTTP APIs
schema.title: ProblemDetail

schema.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details for HTTP APIs
schema.title: ProblemDetail
